findings.evidence: VAT_RATE changed from "0.09" to "0.06". Single source-of-truth update; all consumers use Decimal(config.VAT_RATE) so no hardcoded rates exist elsewhere.
Standard customer breakdown: tax 1.80 -> 1.20, total 21.80 -> 21.20. Correct: 20.00 * 0.06 = 1.20; 20.00 + 1.20 = 21.20.
Gold customer breakdown: tax 8.10 -> 5.40, total 98.10 -> 95.40. Correct: taxable_after_discount = 90.00; 90.00 * 0.06 = 5.40; 100.00 - 10.00 + 5.40 = 95.40.
Orders service totals: tax 3.97 -> 2.65, total 54.57 -> 53.25. Correct: taxable_base_after_discount = 44.10; 44.10 * 0.06 = 2.646 -> rounds to 2.65; 49.00 - 4.90 + 2.65 + 6.50 = 53.25.
Handler integration total updated 54.57 -> 53.25, consistent with orders service test above.
